headline: Assessment blocked by lack of on-chain read capability

rationale.verdict: Assessment blocked: unable to perform on-chain reads via the DeFiPunkd API to check for allowlists, operators, and sanctions (A1, A2, A4, A5). Additionally, active frontend restrictions (A3) and ToS verbatim extraction (A6) could not be verified without a dedicated browser tool to fetch the raw data directly.

unknowns: A1: Could not perform on-chain read to check for whitelist modifiers.
A2: Could not perform on-chain read to identify off-chain operators in admission path.
A3: Could not verify active frontend restrictions (geo-block, KYC) or passive ToS from static fetch.
A3b: Alternative access paths not investigated.
A4: Could not perform on-chain read to verify sanctions tooling.
A5: Could not perform on-chain read to check read vs write access restrictions.
A6: Could not extract verbatim ToS jurisdictional clause.
